summary: Profile of Cavallo associate seller and certified PHCP barefoot trimmer Maia Chaput, covering her background, certification path, and trimming work in Quebec.
Q&A with Carole on how to treat and heal a hoof abscess, explaining how Cavallo boots and pads support movement and can be modified into therapy boots.
Promotes the Cavallo online learning library of 30+ articles on barefoot horse keeping and booting shod horses, listing sample topics and pointing to the archive.
Invites readers to subscribe to the Cavallo YouTube channel, linking how-to videos on measuring, applying, and using hoof boots for riding, driving, turnout, and rehab.
Explains how Cavallo boots and pads help older horses with arthritis and metabolic issues stay comfortable and mobile, with examples of three aging equines returning to the trails.
A 12-point checklist of features to consider when buying hoof boots, covering value, durability, fit, and performance, framed as a Q&A with designer Carole.
Addresses common beginner concerns about hoof boots (falling off, speed, heel bulbs) and explains how Cavallo boots stay on and protect hooves across terrain.
Q&A explaining why Cavallo boots work over metal shoes, covering trailer safety, traction, and protection for shod horses, not just barefoot ones.
Q&A on fitting Cavallo hoof boots to mules, recommending the Slim Sole option for their narrower hooves and explaining proper sizing for packing, trails, and rehab.
Argues aging horses may not be ready for retirement, explaining how Cavallo boots and pads ease arthritis and encourage movement, with examples of horses returning to work.
Recounts Cavallo's 2021 donation of boots, wraps, and pads to wildfire-affected horse rescues in BC and beyond, coordinated through Perfect Pastures Animal Sanctuary.
Holiday gift guide spotlighting the Trek hoof boot for shod and barefoot horses, plus ELB Bling, Simple Boot, and CLB options for ponies and miniatures.
